thanks for sharing. But this only reflects parts of the discussion.

Since I too provide public mail listings for my users, I know, this is
a difficult issue.

From my point of view, this IETF Web-based ML is dysfunctional because
it is difficult to digest the important topics.

Subscribers often express their oppinion not matching the topic
(Subject). This is bad for readers and digesting.

Regards.
--eh.
